authority: JSON schema is authoritative; Markdown schema is explanatory.

trace_verification.format_reference: reference/cpp/trace.cpp Trace emits ->function, indented input/output/Global/Struct lines, and <- function markers.

global_constants.VISIBLE_WINDOW_EXTRACTION: start_idx is top visible symbol; row r uses (start_idx + r) % reel_length; pay_window[row][reel] row-major
global_constants.DIRECT_SCATTER_WIN_POLICY: No direct SCATTER win is awarded when SCATTER wins are not mentioned, per 2026-06-14 human review.

paytables.scatter_direct_award_policy: zero direct win unless human review later reinstates SCATTER paytable awards

core_data_structures.SymbolCell: symbol plus optional cor_value_x_bet, jackpot_name, wild_multiplier
core_data_structures.ReelStrip: ordered list of SymbolId for one reel
core_data_structures.WeightedTable: map of outcome to non-negative integer weight
core_data_structures.RngSource: deterministic injectable source for weighted choice, reel stop choice, and position sampling

function_contracts.name: runOneSpin
function_contracts.purpose: Resolve one paid base spin and any selected feature branch.
pseudocode: validate wager against known minimum bet; do not enforce missing maximum or denomination
select base reelset using B1/B2 weights
generate base pay window
apply optional base COR injection
evaluate base ways, scatter count, and collect wins
if base scatter count >= 3, require feature_choice and execute selected feature award
aggregate win buckets and return SpinResult

function_contracts.name: selectBaseReelset
function_contracts.purpose: Select B1 or B2 for a base spin.
pseudocode: weighted choice over B1=58 and B2=42

function_contracts.name: generatePayWindow
function_contracts.purpose: Build a visible window from a named reelset and reel stop positions.
pseudocode: for each reel choose or accept a stop index in [0, reel_size-1]
treat stop index as top visible symbol
fill rows downward with (stop_index + row) mod reel_length
store row-major as pay_window[row][reel]

function_contracts.name: injectAdditionalCOR
function_contracts.purpose: Optionally add extra COR symbols to the base-game window.
pseudocode: choose trigger yes/no with weights 1/9
if no, return unchanged window
if yes, choose added COR count by weights
sample eligible positions excluding existing COLLECT, WILD, or SCATTER
assign each added COR a value from base COR value weights

function_contracts.name: evaluateBaseWindow
function_contracts.purpose: Evaluate all base-game win buckets after final base window is known.
pseudocode: evaluate ways wins
count SCATTER symbols
set direct scatter win to zero per human review when SCATTER wins are not mentioned
evaluate collect bucket if COLLECT and COR/jackpot-bearing COR are visible
return line, scatter, COR, and trigger metadata

function_contracts.name: evaluateWaysWins
pseudocode: for each standard symbol, count matching or WILD symbols on consecutive reels from reel 1
stop at first reel with zero matches
if matched kind has a paytable tier, ways = product of per-reel match counts
add paytable factor times ways to line win factor
WILD substitutes only for standard symbols

function_contracts.name: countScatters
function_contracts.purpose: Count SCATTER symbols anywhere in a window.
pseudocode: count cells equal to SCATTER; WILD never substitutes for SCATTER

function_contracts.name: evaluateScatterWin
pseudocode: return zero direct SCATTER win when SCATTER wins are not mentioned; keep scatter count for triggers and retriggers

function_contracts.name: evaluateCollect
function_contracts.purpose: Evaluate COLLECT/COR collection in base game or Blitz Spins.
pseudocode: if mode not base_game or blitz_spins return zero
find COLLECT cells on reel 1 and reel 6
find all visible COR and jackpot-bearing COR cells
for each COLLECT independently sum all COR and jackpot values
multiply collected x-bet sum by total bet for payout amount

function_contracts.name: resolveFeatureSelection
function_contracts.purpose: Map base scatter count and player choice to a feature award.
pseudocode: require scatter_count in 3..6
select free_spins or blitz_spins award from table
do not resolve Buy Bonus because scope is ambiguous

function_contracts.name: runFreeSpins
pseudocode: while remaining spins > 0 generate F1 window
assign multipliers to visible WILD symbols using weights 2/3/5
evaluate ways and scatter count
multiply non-scatter line wins by product of all visible WILD multipliers
do not multiply scatter bucket
add retrigger spins for 2 or more SCATTER
exit when no spins remain

function_contracts.name: assignFreeSpinWildMultipliers
function_contracts.purpose: Assign multipliers to Free Spins WILD symbols.
pseudocode: for each WILD cell choose multiplier by weights 2=480, 3=545, 5=360
non-WILD cells have neutral multiplier 1

function_contracts.name: runBlitzSpins
pseudocode: for each awarded spin create an empty 4x6 Blitz window
place 1 or 2 COLLECT symbols on reel 1 and/or reel 6 with max one per reel
for every non-COLLECT position resolve COR yes/no
if zero COR were placed, force one COR
assign exactly one COR value from Good table and all remaining COR values from Bad table
evaluate collect
reset screen for next spin
no retriggers

function_contracts.name: buildBlitzWindow
pseudocode: choose collect count 1 or 2
place COLLECT only on reel 1 and/or reel 6, max one per reel
resolve COR on non-COLLECT cells
force one COR if none appears

function_contracts.name: assignCORValues
function_contracts.purpose: Assign x-bet values to COR symbols for a mode.
pseudocode: base/injected COR values use base value weights
Blitz uses Good table exactly once per spin and Bad table for all other CORs
jackpot-bearing COR values use the same x-bet values as jackpot constants

evaluate base ways, scatter count, and collect wins

execution_traces.format_reference: reference/cpp/trace.cpp Trace emits ->function, indented input/output/Global/Struct lines, and <- function markers.

collect.trigger: COLLECT visible on reel 1 and/or reel 6 while COR or jackpot-bearing COR is visible
collect.exit: after all visible COR values are independently collected by each COLLECT

feature_selection.trigger: 3 or more SCATTER in base game

free_spins.multiplier_rule: All WILD multipliers on the screen multiply together and apply to non-scatter wins whether or not the WILD participates.
exclusions: COR and COLLECT do not appear
WILD multiplier does not apply to SCATTER wins
free_spins.exit: when all free spins including retriggers are exhausted

blitz_spins.value_assignment_rule: Good table is used exactly for one COR per spin; Bad table is used for all other CORs.
blitz_spins.exit: when awarded Blitz spins are exhausted

buy_bonus.reason: Parsheet contains Buy Bonus costs, RTPs, and feature entry tables, but DOCX rules do not describe Buy Bonus availability or UI rules.
buy_bonus.free_game_option_note: Buy Bonus FG sheet maps 4/5/6 scatters to 12/20/30 FS and uses BB F2/BB F3/BB F4 reelsets depending on scatter count.

known_issues: Required trace file checks/traces/ref_trace.txt / trace_ref.txt is absent; trace verification could not be performed.
Buy Bonus remains ambiguous and must not be implemented as player-facing unless human review confirms scope.
Maximum bet, denomination, jackpot-frequency tolerances, and volatility/feature-frequency pass/fail thresholds remain unspecified.
